summary: Iteration 21 - CRITICAL: Production frontend pointing to WRONG backend URL. Preview works perfectly, Production completely broken due to deployment misconfiguration.

critical.issue: Production frontend (https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br) is calling WRONG backend URL (https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host) instead of production backend
critical.evidence: Console error: Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host/api/auth/login' from origin 'https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br' has been blocked by CORS policy
critical.root_cause: Frontend was NOT rebuilt with correct REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before deploying to VPS. The deploy script (atualizar-vps.sh line 16) should set REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br but the deployed build still has the preview URL

admin_login.production: FAILS - 'Algo deu errado. Tente novamente.' due to CORS error calling wrong backend

portal_login.preview: SUCCESS - CPF 23211311874, telefone 19920090179 works, shows Adriana's dashboard
portal_login.production: FAILS - 'Erro interno ao processar login. Tente novamente.' with 500 error

clientes_alphabetical_sorting.preview: WORKING - Clients sorted A-Z (Adilson, Adriana, Adriano, Ailton, Alberto...)

test_results.production_admin_login: FAIL - CORS error, wrong backend URL

action_items: CRITICAL: Re-deploy production frontend with correct REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
Run the deploy script: cd /tmp/mvno-homeon && git pull && cd frontend && yarn install && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br yarn build && sudo cp -r build/* /var/www/mvno/frontend/
Verify production backend is running on port 3002 and accessible via https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br/api/
After redeployment, test admin login with admin@mvno.com / admin123 AND ailtonhomeon@gmail.com / gi157258
After redeployment, verify Clientes page shows alphabetical sorting
After redeployment, verify Adriana's data matches preview
critical_code_review_comments: The deploy script /app/deploy/atualizar-vps.sh is CORRECT - it sets REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br on line 16
The issue is that the script was either not run, or the frontend build was overwritten with a preview build
The production frontend JavaScript is calling https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host which is the PREVIEW backend URL
This is a deployment process issue, NOT a code issue

success_rate.production: 0% (0/4 tests passed - all blocked by wrong backend URL)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL DEPLOYMENT ISSUE: Production frontend at https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br is pointing to wrong backend (https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host instead of production). The deploy script is correct but was not executed properly. Preview environment (https://chip-manager-3.preview.emergentagent.com) works perfectly - admin login, portal login, alphabetical sorting all working. After fixing deployment, retest all production features.

rca_of_the_issue.problem: Production frontend not reflecting preview changes
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Production frontend was deployed with WRONG REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pointing to preview backend (https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host) instead of production backend (https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br)
evidence: Console error shows CORS blocking requests to https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host from https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br
Admin login fails with 'Algo deu errado' on production but works on preview
Portal login fails with 500 error on production but works on preview
reproduction_steps: 3. Enter admin@mvno.com / admin123 and click Entrar
4. Observe CORS error in console showing request to https://chip-manager-3.emergent.host
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Re-run deploy script: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://mvno.homeonapp.com.br yarn build && sudo cp -r build/* /var/www/mvno/frontend/
